mapper.delete: DELETE FROM student_ideology_achievements WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND classroom_id = #{classroomId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, paper_id AS paperId, classroom_id AS classroomId, test_id AS testId, course_name AS courseName, classroom_name AS classroomName, paper_name AS paperName, test_name AS testName, catelog, creator, create_time AS createTime, `row` FROM ideology_calculate_paper WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId}
SELECT courseId FROM cm_classroom WHERE id = #{classroomId}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, course_id AS courseId, v_id AS vId, classroom_id AS classroomId, value_count AS valueCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM student_ideology_achievements WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT id, course_id AS courseId, v_id AS vId, classroom_id AS classroomId, value_count AS valueCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM classroom_ideology_achievements WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId}
